1.title: Share the Love
1.description: This lovely badge was earned by users who shared their favorite Twitch clips in February 2025.

1.title: SUBtember 2024
1.description: For being Subbie's friend and participating in SUBtember 2024!

1.title: Twitch Recap 2025
1.description: This exclusive badge was earned by the top 20% of Twitch users in 2025.

1.title: Turbo
1.description: A subscriber of Twitch's monthly premium user service

message.body: should've had a map16 edit to make the right side air
not enough fork jumps for MMM
I'm getting more cool or cruel vibes
This is like snarly if it was made in 2010 or something
my first impression was also C|C
cement + fireballs + thwomps + throw block tunnels
though i will say that i just don't know MMM
probably have seen it but can't remember
This will be cool or cruel in 2026
although the vines are not very C|C
i wonder if i watched that
no that's just a mesen feature
grab a shell and use it to get another feather in the item box Kapp
but you can see a yellow number go up by 1
now you have a note block to practice the door entry on
ok well i had 1 idea and it makes no sense
so my idea was activate the noteblock but keep the big boo to get back up
and then i realized that you can just use the big boo then
that's also too high for the noteblock anywayt
now this is how I want my trains to run. crazy.
i hope the midway starts you to the left of those
But why do all this when you can just replay the top secret area and use the feather to fly under the level
clearly you do what turnblocks are best for and dupe
You're missing the top secret area exit
was this the slightly faster bowser fight
Put the grey pswitch on the right platform?
Get it on the left platform
you technically don't need to keep it
...does the test room give you bad sprite slots? lol
shell jump up near the note blocks?
They're walljump protected but you can still do a walljump at the bottom and use the shell and pswitch to get up
can't you just hit 3 then 2 again?
or is that not a thing with being on yoshi
nono that was a great idea
Lets you bring the pswitch tho
was about to suggest just throwing it up
oh so this is a C||C obstacle.
you go back and get the bullet
Oh wait i think the p-switch would be unreachable if you brought it
It's a short one, just three screens
There are playthroughs of the first two levels
so you're saying we're missing a springboard
this is the gameplay i watch for
Would be funny if hf accidentally 255s the ow without realizing and then gets scammed out of an exit because of that one address that overflows
False if you do layer switch glitch
i wish more hack creators would put helpful messages like that
maybe he updates the hack to correct the mistake
why do I know this hack
those are AA batteries that zap mario when he touches them
I think anon showed me this
it's the item abuse parakoopa setup
He didn't dare steal the AA blocks
Nice trick hf but the level is down there
Springboard and shells and yoshi hack
aaaah did the music budget run out after 2 levels already...
Is it item abuse music if this was made before item abuse
It's springboard and shells hack music
That makes sense since pit of despair didn't have this music
that message ought to be asm nobody need: having a p-switch either on the ground or in mid air gives you a double jump.
but if the p-switch is under water or in lava, then it doesn't work.
Springboard And Pswitch and Ropes Hack
is this an rta player branching out to pit? is that what i'm seeing?
i hadnt heard of this one
maybe cuz it doesnt sound like a hack title
its a lazy descriptor at best :]
panga's finest work. springboard and foss hack
I know this cause anon recorded playing a bit of this RTA (with kaizo blocks edited to be visible)
Oh right, slope assist tiles didn't really exist before modern kaizo
if only mario was in a bathing suit with 99 lives
Will have to get a 1up from the bonus star and timer digits at the goal tape
math in my mario; the way god intended
Message box for all the Japanese players out there
I bet you didn't know that you can hold donw to drop items instead of throwing them
Well duh you didn't destroy it you just activated a keyhole
Destruction is tied to event number
Imagine you actually don't need to carry it to the end
they should've put the message box next to the pipe and only accessible with pressed p-switch
and then not made it required
ahh I didn’t read the title
Goal Point Question Sphere that acts like a castle dynamite
As we all know Green Cavern invented the cave music so panga used something else here
I was wondering why they wouldn't jump
But you can't scroll the screen left for some screens to respawn him
actually i could, i just choose not to
Every hack should have 100 blocks inserted with Jonwil's Blocktool
It makes sense, you don't usually find trees in caves
Sumo bro is a vibe killer
Noise sound effects enable echo in SMW
Shell and a Sprinboard on the same screen
See if there's some map16 edit
Have to optimize the Pokey ride
Not willing to time out for a moon smh
Maybe the last level needs it?
It's required if you grab the checkpoint and die I guess
Are there things that call rng in the first half?
When do blue koopas use rng?
So i guess the eerie pattern would be different
Where do you plan on standing after killing the boss
Only goal tape kills the generator
I wonder if this boss is way easier when you attempt it without dying after the checkpoint
S.A.S. hack 2 was what people have been waiting for all this time and instead we got Dram 3
Calling the final level god insane and then using vanilla music and palette is definitely a choice
Yeah but the last level was green at least
And then it started raining liquid nitrogen. Don't ask why, it just happened.
I guess armageddon is for losers
past the level end i'm guessing
Have there been Shells in this level?
the message box at the start said no
first it advetises shells and springboards, then it says it won't provide them for the final level
but p-switches can be used like shells, as we have learned
i guess that's just a thing
kinda figured just didn't know it was
surely the rng is not going to make this take forever
"is this the armageddon seed" is a terrifying statement
Does killing the dummies do anything?
but other than that no not really
Could you do some rng calls before the boss so you can get that 1st position wendy earlier?
i guess it's not actually clear how much you can delay it though
i wanna say sparkys do too but i mean with the timer going on and all
That truly was the spingboard and shells hack
I highly doubt panga programmed everything
Yeah this is nowhere near as difficult as kaizo mario world
how old was panga when he made this
2005? This had Addmusic which is at least mid 2007
